title: limeum angustifolium
intro: Limeum angustifolium, also known as Mexican prickly poppy, is a plant species belonging to the family Limoniaceae. The medicinal properties of Limeum angustifolium include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its alkaloid content. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to treat skin irritations, wounds, and minor burns due to its antiseptic properties. Limeum angustifolium can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or topical ointments to take advantage of its medicinal properties, although further research is necessary to confirm its efficacy.
